subcodes.first_line: O remnant of that Essence of Guidance! At all times and seasons thou hast been, and art still, present in our thoughts, and from the threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن جوهر هدی در جمیع اوقات و احیان در خاطر بوده و هستید و از درگاه
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
